title: Supensour project config
description: <repo>/.supensour/config/config.yaml — per-repo hints that let skills skip detection. All fields optional.

git.description: Git platform hints for this repo.

platform.description: Key into the global catalog's platform.platforms → skip platform auto-detect.

token_env.description: Override the platform's token_env for this repo.

base_branch.description: Default diff base → skip base-branch detection.

language.description: Default --lang for review-code / create-tests → skip extension sniffing.
